title: Kardigan Files for IPO to Fund Cardiovascular Disease Treatment
title_cn: 卡迪根申请首次公开募股以资助心血管疾病治疗
summary: Kardigan Inc. filed for a US initial public offering that will help fund three late-stage drugs that target the root cause of cardiovascular diseases.

title: US Touts Iran Deal Prospects Even as Tensions Fester
title_cn: 尽管紧张局势加剧，美国仍大力宣传伊朗协议前景
summary: Get caught up.

title: Stocks Extend Highs on AI Optimism as Oil Slides: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油滑坡，人工智能乐观情绪延续高点：市场结束
summary: The rally in US stocks is set to stretch into a fifth day as optimism around artificial intelligence, lower oil prices and easing bond yields combined to drive an increasingly bullish mood.

title: Oil Slides as Iran Says Talks With US to End War Are Continuing
title_cn: 伊朗称与美国结束战争的谈判仍在继续，油价下跌
summary: Oil dropped on hopes that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: ECB Says Leveraged Hedge Fund Bets Risk Bond Market Instability
title_cn: 欧洲央行表示杠杆对冲基金押注债券市场不稳定的风险
summary: The European Central Bank warned that the growing role of highly-leveraged trades in the region’s bond markets poses a risk to financial stability.

title: Germany’s Reiche Tells EU to Avoid Harming Exports to China
title_cn: 德国赖希告诉欧盟避免损害对华出口
summary: German Economy Minister Katherina Reiche said the European Union should ensure that any measures it applies on Chinese trade don’t harm the bloc’s exports to the country.

title: Euronext Weighs Revising Data Price Hikes After Pushback
title_cn: 泛欧交易所考虑修改数据 价格上涨受到阻力后
summary: Euronext NV is considering changes to its planned overhaul of data fees, which critics have said would raise the cost of crucial trading information for some market participants.

title: Merz Advisers Slash German Outlook, See Faster Inflation
title_cn: 默茨顾问大幅下调德国经济前景，通胀加速
summary: Economic advisers to German Chancellor Friedrich Merz almost halved their forecast for growth this year as the war in the Middle East and US trade policy weigh on activity.

title: HK Banks Tighten Scrutiny of Chinese Clients After Curbs
title_cn: 限制措施实施后，香港银行加强对中国客户的审查
summary: Hong Kong banks are ramping up scrutiny of mainland Chinese clients opening savings and investment accounts, part of a broader push to stem capital flight after Beijing launched an unprecedented crackdown on illegal cross-border trading.

title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
title_cn: Salesforce 的盈利可以消除对人工智能的恐惧，提振股价
summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.

title: Meloni Told by IMF That Italy’s Energy Aid Must Be More Targeted
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织告诉梅洛尼，意大利的能源援助必须更有针对性
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni got told by the International Monetary Fund that her government’s energy aid should target poorer families rather than apply to everyone.

title: HDFC Bank Denies Allegations as Governance Scrutiny Deepens
title_cn: 随着治理审查的加深，HDFC 银行否认指控
summary: India’s largest private sector lender HDFC Bank denied any wrongdoing and pushed back on a media report that alleged it paid higher interest to a state-owned company, a claim that wiped out about $3 billion in market value.

title: Son of Slain Communist Rattles Investors Ahead of Colombian Vote
title_cn: 被杀共产党人的儿子在哥伦比亚投票前令投资者不安
summary: The son of a slain communist leader is rattling markets ahead of Colombia’s presidential election, as investors weigh whether he can win — and how radically he would govern if he does.

title: Gold Holds Loss as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊协议前景，金价维持跌势
summary: Gold held losses as investors weighed the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal against the risk that continued turmoil in the Middle East will prolong inflation and keep borrowing costs higher for longer.

title: Zambia State Mining Firm Strikes Lime Deal With Chinese Operator
title_cn: 赞比亚国有矿业公司与中国运营商达成石灰交易
summary: Zambia’s state-controlled mining investment company, ZCCM Investments Holdings Plc, agreed to sell a majority stake in a lime and cement venture to a privately held Chinese company.

title: Memory Chip Giant CXMT Heads for China’s Biggest IPO Since 2022
title_cn: 存储芯片巨头长鑫存储即将进行2022年以来中国最大规模的IPO
summary: Memory chip maker ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. has received approval from the Shanghai Stock Exchange for an initial public offering that’s on track to be the biggest in mainland China since 2022, in a milestone for one of the key technologies of the artificial intelligence buildout.

title: SK Hynix Joins $1 Trillion Club Amid AI Frenzy
title_cn: SK 海力士在人工智能狂热中加入 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: South Korea’s SK Hynix became just the third Asian company to join the $1 trillion club as a breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks and an AI frenzy reshapes economies worldwide. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Strategists Lift S&P 500 Target to 8,000 on AI, Earnings
title_cn: 高盛策略师将标普 500 指数目标上调至 8,000 点
summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. joined peers at Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank AG in seeing a 17% return for the S&P 500 Index this year.

title: Transforming the Electrical Grid to Power AI
title_cn: 改造电网为人工智能提供动力
summary: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FX Hedging Gains Steam at US, UK Firms as War Sparks Volatility
title_cn: 战争引发波动，美国和英国公司的外汇对冲活动蓬勃发展
summary: Companies in the US and the UK ramped up their currency hedges last quarter as the war in Iran roiled global markets, an industry survey shows.

title: ECB Sees Danger of Sudden and Sharp Repricing in Markets
title_cn: 欧洲央行看到市场突然大幅重新定价的危险
summary: Financial markets are in danger of a sudden and significant correction, with investors downplaying threats from factors including the Iran war, the European Central Bank warned.

title: Why China Is Tightening Controls on Overseas Stock Trading
title_cn: 中国为何收紧对海外股票交易的控制
summary: China’s efforts to control capital outflows are colliding with growing demand from mainland investors for access to overseas stocks.

title: Russian Black Sea Port of Tuapse Tackles Fire After Drone Strike
title_cn: 俄罗斯黑海图阿普谢港在无人机袭击后扑灭火灾
summary: A fire broke out at Russia’s Black Sea port of Tuapse after another Ukrainian drone attack overnight, as authorities continue to clear up damage to coastline following multiple strikes in recent weeks.

title: BP’s Ousted Chair Manifold Disputes Firm's Accusations
title_cn: 英国石油公司 (BP) 董事长被罢免，对公司的指控提出异议
summary: Former BP Chairman Albert Manifold says he was fired without warning or explanation and will challenge the company’s version of events, deepening the turmoil around the UK oil major’s latest leadership change. BP fired Manifold on Tuesday after eight months on the job, citing “serious concerns” related to “governance standards, oversight and conduct.” Bloomberg's Mitchell Ferman has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: France Sticks to Plans to Narrow Deficit as Iran War Weighs
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争的影响，法国坚持缩小赤字的计划
summary: French Finance Minister Roland Lescure reiterated the government’s goal to reduce the deficit to 5% of output this year and below 3% in 2029 even as the Iran conflict weighs on the economy.

title: Lufthansa Says Fuel Supply Stable, Urges Summer Bookings
title_cn: 汉莎航空表示燃油供应稳定，敦促夏季预订
summary: Deutsche Lufthansa AG reassured customers that fuel supply is stable and urged passengers to “absolutely” book summer vacations, an appeal that comes as Europe’s largest airline group depends on peak travel demand to meet its financial goals.

title: Price-Action Is Bearish Even at Records: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 即使创历史新高，价格走势仍看跌：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Joumanna Bercetche, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士、美光进入 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

title: European Stocks Near Record as Tech Rallies, Oil Prices Ease
title_cn: 随着科技股上涨、油价下跌，欧洲股市接近历史新高
summary: European stocks gained, edging closer to their pre-war record high, as technology shares climbed and easing geopolitical tensions sent oil prices lower.

title: Memory Mania Overshadows Investors' Fears Around Iran War | Insight with Haslinda Amin 5/27/2026
title_cn: 记忆狂热掩盖了投资者对伊朗战争的担忧哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 5/27/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Is Delaying Approvals of Airbus Deliveries
title_cn: 中国推迟批准空客交付
summary: For the past several months, the Civil Aviation Administration of China has delayed the final approval that allows Airbus jets to enter the country and be put into service, according to people familiar with the matter. The move signals impatience with how long European regulators are taking to certify Chinese-made aircraft. Bloomberg's Danny Lee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Germany, Spain Push Back on Europe’s Plans to Ban Huawei Gear
title_cn: 德国、西班牙抵制欧洲禁止华为设备的计划
summary: Germany and Spain are leading opposition to European Commission plans to ban Chinese technology suppliers from telecom networks as part of new cybersecurity rules, according to people familiar with the negotiations.

title: China to Invest $1.1 Billion in Serbia in AI, Robots and Cars
title_cn: 中国将向塞尔维亚投资11亿美元用于人工智能、机器人和汽车
summary: Chinese companies will pour an additional €940 million ($1.1 billion) to expand their footprint in Serbia, in a major boost to the Balkan country’s economy, President Aleksandar Vucic said.

title: Prediction Markets Are Booming. So Are Worries About Rampant Insider Trading
title_cn: 预测市场正在蓬勃发展。对猖獗的内幕交易的担忧也是如此
summary: Prediction markets, where users can place bets on real-world outcomes in anything from sports and award shows to elections, interest rate decisions, and even military operations, have become a multi-billion-dollar industry in just a few years. Along the way, they have also become the focus of growing concern that some participants are using privileged information to profit.

title: Plenty of Ways to Play AI Trade in Europe, Goldman Sachs Says
title_cn: 高盛表示，在欧洲进行人工智能贸易的方式有很多
summary: Sharon Bell, equity strategist at Goldman Sachs, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she thinks European stocks, and not just tech firms, can benefit. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI May Impact 120 Million Workers in Advanced Economies
title_cn: 人工智能可能会影响发达经济体的 1.2 亿工人
summary: As global banking executives weigh the potential impact of artificial intelligence on their industry, research by Bloomberg Intelligence finds that AI will likely impact 27% of workers across all sectors in advanced economies — more than 120 million in the 31 countries covered by the study. Bloomberg's Charlie Wells and Ana Andrade have more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Automation, Job Loss Fears and Where New Work Emerges
title_cn: 人工智能自动化、失业担忧以及新工作的出现
summary: Concerns are growing that artificial intelligence could accelerate job losses as automation spreads across industries. This segment examines whether AI will ultimately displace workers or create new forms of employment by complementing human expertise. The discussion focuses on corporate decision‑making, productivity limits, and the challenge of ensuring new jobs are widely shared, as the U.S., China, and other economies race to adopt AI technologies. Simon Johnson, MIT Sloan Professor of Entrepreneurship and Nobel Laureate, joined Stephen on the sidelines of the UBS conference on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss the economic, social, and geopolitical implications of AI adoption. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ByteDance Weighs Capex of as Much as $70 Billion in AI Push
title_cn: 字节跳动称人工智能推动资本支出高达 700 亿美元
summary: ByteDance Ltd., the developer of TikTok and a leading force in artificial intelligence, is considering increasing its capital spending to more than double last year’s in a bid to lead the Chinese AI market and challenge the top US players abroad.

title: Volvo Car Avoids US Ban on Connected Vehicles Tied to China
title_cn: 沃尔沃汽车避开美国对中国联网汽车的禁令
summary: The Trump administration reached an agreement with Volvo Car AB that will allow the automaker to avoid a US ban on connected vehicles tied to China.

title: Samsung Staff Accept Wage Deal That Averts Chip Plant Strike
title_cn: 三星员工接受工资协议以避免芯片厂罢工
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. union members voted in favor of a compensation deal that will hand chip workers an average bonus of about $340,000, staving off a strike that threatened to disrupt global chip supply.

title: Why Huawei’s New Chipmaking Plan Has Investors Buzzing
title_cn: 为什么华为的新芯片制造计划引起投资者热议
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered an insatiable demand for computing power, with companies such as Amazon.com Inc., Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. pouring hundreds of billions of dollars into data centers and advanced chips developed by US semiconductor giant Nvidia Corp.

title: Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term
title_cn: 新加坡让 Byju 创始人首次入狱
summary: The fallen billionaire was sentenced to six months in jail for contempt of court.

title: Risk of Potential Liquidity Overhang in AI: GGL Capital
title_cn: 人工智能领域潜在流动性过剩的风险：GGL Capital
summary: Gigi Luk of GGL Capital Investment Group says "one risk that we're seeing is the potential liquidity overhang in AI." Luk adds that "the gap between winners and losers is widening structurally" and this creates opportunities. She speaks on Bloomberg Television.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verisilicon Chairman on Growth Outlook
title_cn: 芯原科技董事长谈增长前景
summary:
Wayne Dai, Chairman of Verisilicon, discusses the outlook for business and growth, as the Chinese chip stocks in China outperform global peers.
He speaks exclusively with Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mizuho Financial Group CEO on BOJ Outlook
title_cn: 瑞穗金融集团首席执行官谈日本央行展望
summary:
Masahiro Kihara, President & Group CEO at Mizuho Financial Group, expects the BOJ to raise rates in June or July. He also discusses the outlook for business as the bank forecasts another year of profit growth.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mythos Risk Prompts India to Test for Financial Software Flaws
title_cn: 神话风险促使印度测试金融软件缺陷
summary: India is undertaking tests of some of its most sensitive public-facing financial and government application software to better understand their vulnerabilities to Anthropic PBC’s next-generation Mythos AI model, according to Indian officials familiar with the matter.

title: Taiwan Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China Via Japan
title_cn: 台湾怀疑英伟达芯片经日本走私至中国
summary: Taiwan prosecutors suspect that three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士跻身 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix and Micron Technology above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry. Bloomberg's David Savage breaks down the trends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UBS’ Khan Says AI Will Impact Jobs While Aiding Productivity
title_cn: 瑞银集团 (UBS) 的可汗表示，人工智能将在提高生产力的同时影响工作
summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan said artificial intelligence will free up capacity and improve productivity but also have an impact on jobs.

title: Fireworks AI in Talks for Funding at $15 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Fireworks AI 正在洽谈估值 150 亿美元的融资
summary: Fireworks AI, a startup that helps companies run artificial intelligence models, is in talks to raise a new round of funding that would value the company at $15 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Slim to Invest $5 Billion This Year, Won’t Seek New Pemex Bets
title_cn: Slim 今年将投资 50 亿美元，不会寻求新的墨西哥石油公司押注
summary: Mexican billionaire Carlos Slim is planning to invest around $5 billion this year but will steer clear of new ventures with oil driller Petroleos Mexicanos, the 86-year-old chairman emeritus of Grupo Carso said Tuesday.

title: Stocks Rise Toward Record on Iran Peace Hopes | The Close 5/26/2026
title_cn: 伊朗和平希望推动股市上涨创历史新高收盘价 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Fidelity Director of Global Macro Jurrien Timmer, EquiLend Managing Director Head of Data & Insights Nancy Allen, Barclay’s Managing Director Senior Retail Analyst Adrienne Yih, Davidson Kempner Managing Partner & CIO Tony Yoseloff, Deutsche Bank’s Chief US Equity & Global Strategist Binky Chadha, Valoir CEO Rebecca Wettemann, Janus Henderson’s John Lloyd, Cain CEO Jonathan Goldstein, & Stord Co-Founder CEO Sean Henry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股助推火箭和卫星股票飙升
summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified.

title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会主席阿特金斯对预测市场基金踩刹车
summary: Bloomberg's Vildana Hajric and Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart join Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Has More Bitcoin Than Estimated, SEC Filing Shows
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 文件显示，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 拥有的比特币数量超出预期
summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds more than twice as much Bitcoin as previously estimated. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Tops $1 Trillion in Value as UBS Says Stock Could Double
title_cn: 瑞银称美光股价可能翻倍，市值突破 1 万亿美元
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s market capitalization, which has soared about 840% over the past year, will more than double over the next 12 months, according to at least one analyst.

title: Former Leaders Come Out of the Shadows
title_cn: 前领导人走出阴影
summary: Ex-Prime Minister Tony Blair has weighed in on the state of the UK with a 5,600-word essay.

title: Hungary Reverses Decision to Exit International Criminal Court
title_cn: 匈牙利撤销退出国际刑事法院的决定
summary: Hungary withdrew its decision to exit the International Criminal Court, reversing a process initiated by the country’s previous leader, Viktor Orban.

title: Thailand to Quarantine Some Travelers to Keep Ebola Out
title_cn: 泰国将隔离部分旅客以防范埃博拉病毒
summary: Thailand imposed a mandatory 21-day quarantine on people traveling from the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, as the Southeast Asian travel hotspot becomes the first country in the world to implement such strict measures.

title: The Secret Supply Chain Keeping Russia’s Jets in the Air
title_cn: 俄罗斯喷气式飞机保持飞行的秘密供应链
summary: Russian airlines are circumventing US, European Union and UK sanctions by procuring aviation equipment via India, Turkey, the United Arab Emirates and Kazakhstan, among others, a Bloomberg investigation shows. Some spare parts were tracked by serial numbers as they journeyed from Western suppliers to intermediaries to Russian companies. Bloomberg News contacted parties involved in such deals, and several said they would no longer do business with each other or with Russia. Bloomberg's Kate Duffy reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel Increases Attacks on Lebanon as US-Iran Talks Crawl On
title_cn: 随着美伊谈判进展缓慢，以色列加大对黎巴嫩的袭击力度
summary: Israel stepped up attacks on Lebanon and said its ground forces would move further into the country, potentially complicating US-Iran talks on an interim peace deal.

title: Spanish Police Search Socialist Party HQ in Widening Graft Probe
title_cn: 西班牙警方在扩大腐败调查中搜查社会党总部
summary: Spanish police seized information from the ruling Socialist Party’s headquarters, as part of a broad criminal investigation that’s gripping the country and roiling the government of Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez.

title: Cubanos que eludieron la deportación en EE.UU., ahora están varados en México
title_cn: 逃避美国驱逐出境的古巴人现在滞留在墨西哥
summary: Mientras Washington intensifica la presión sobre Cuba al restringir el suministro de combustible y endurecer las sanciones económicas, también ha aumentado el cerco sobre los migrantes cubanos que viven en Estados Unidos.

title: Cubans Who Long Avoided US Deportation Are Now Stranded in Mexico
title_cn: 长期避免美国驱逐的古巴人现在滞留在墨西哥
summary: As Washington continues to crush the Cuban economy by cutting off its fuel and hammering it with sanctions, it’s also squeezing Cuban migrants in the US.

title: Swiss to Vote on Stricter Neutrality Proposal in September
title_cn: 瑞士将于九月就更严格的中立提案进行投票
summary: Swiss voters will decide in September if the country should strengthen its commitment to neutrality, a measure that would limit the government’s ability to impose economic sanctions.

title: Mozambique Disputes $2 Billion Claims for Total LNG Project
title_cn: 莫桑比克对总液化天然气项目20亿美元索赔提出争议
summary: Mozambique is disputing $2 billion in costs that TotalEnergies SE and its partners say they incurred during a years-long stoppage of their liquefied natural gas project that’s under construction in the southeast Africa nation, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: Blair Calls for ‘Coherent Plan’ Before Labour Ousts Starmer
title_cn: 布莱尔呼吁在工党罢免斯塔默之前制定“连贯计划”
summary: Former Labour Prime Minister Tony Blair criticized the party he once led for “playing with fire” in its attempt to oust current premier Keir Starmer, while also slamming the government for lacking a clear agenda.

title: UK, Poland Sign Defense Pact to Curb Russia Threat
title_cn: 英国与波兰签署防御协议遏制俄罗斯威胁
summary: The UK is poised to sign a new defense and security pact with Poland, as the NATO allies seek to curb the threat posed by Russia.

title: Crypto Firm HTX Accused by UK of Helping Russia Move Money
title_cn: 英国指控加密货币公司 HTX 帮助俄罗斯转移资金
summary: Cryptocurrency firm HTX has been sanctioned by the UK government, who allege that the exchange was part of “infrastructure” used by Russia to circumvent sanctions and helped move $1.5 billion back to the Kremlin.

title: US Sees Progress in Iran Talks as Clashes Continue
title_cn: 随着冲突继续，美国看到伊朗谈判取得进展
summary: The US is touting progress toward a peace deal with Iran to end the nearly three-month war, despite fresh hostilities and as uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz continues. Bloomberg's Paul Wallace has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Stocks Hit Record as SK Hynix, Micron Soar | Daybreak Europe 05/27/2026
title_cn: SK海力士、美光飙升全球股市创历史新高欧洲黎明 05/27/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global equities extended their record rally as momentum in technology shares accelerated and geopolitical tensions eased.

The market capitalizations of SK Hynix and Micron Technology rose above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

Meanwhile, the US is touting progress towards a peace deal with Iran to end the nearly three-month war, even amid fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz. 

Today's guest:  Anna Titareva, UBS Investment Bank, European Economist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: French Consumer Confidence Dropped to Three-Year Low in May
title_cn: 法国五月消费者信心跌至三年低点
summary: French consumer confidence fell more than expected in May, underscoring risks to the euro area’s second-largest economy as the effects of the Iran war spread.

title: UK Energy Price Cap Rises 13% as Iran War Drives Up Costs
title_cn: 伊朗战争推高成本，英国能源价格上限上涨 13%
summary: UK households will see the biggest increase in energy bills since 2023 as the war in Iran drives up wholesale gas and power costs, adding to broader inflationary pressures weighing on the economy.

title: China Stalls Airbus Deliveries to Push Europe on Comac Jets
title_cn: 中国暂停空客交付以推动中国商飞飞机向欧洲供应
summary: China has been slow-walking approval of Airbus SE plane deliveries to signal impatience with how long European regulators are taking to certify Chinese-made aircraft, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump's Pick Paxton Defeats Cornyn in Texas Primary
title_cn: 特朗普的选择帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州初选中击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton won the state’s Republican Senate runoff, defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with Democrat James Talarico. Paxton clinched the nomination a week after securing an endorsement from President Donald Trump in one of the most expensive primaries in Senate history. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Switzerland’s 10-Million Population Cap Is Worrying Executives
title_cn: 瑞士 1000 万人口上限令高管们担忧
summary: The initiative to limit immigration has strong support ahead of a June ballot.

title: Andy Burnham’s Boom in Manchester and the Areas It Left Behind
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 在曼彻斯特及其留下的地区的繁荣
summary: Andy Burnham, the hot favorite to be Britain’s next prime minister, has boasted of a growth miracle in Greater Manchester where he’s been mayor for just under a decade.

title: Paxton Trounces Cornyn in Texas Runoff After Winning Trump Nod
title_cn: 帕克斯顿赢得特朗普点头后在德克萨斯州决选中击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton stormed to a blowout victory in the state’s Republican Senate runoff, handily defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with a well-funded Democrat, James Talarico.

title: Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes
title_cn: 前总统拜登起诉阻止司法部分享采访录音
summary: Former President Joe Biden is suing the US Justice Department to block officials from sharing audio recordings and interview transcripts he gave for a memoir project with Republicans in Congress and a conservative advocacy group.

title: Texas Voters Get Last Say After Trump Backs Paxton in Runoff
title_cn: 特朗普在决选中支持帕克斯顿后，德克萨斯州选民获得最后发言权
summary: Republican voters in Texas get their final say Tuesday in a drawn out, vitriolic and expensive primary campaign for a US Senate seat, a race that Democrats are watching closely in hopes that they could flip both houses of Congress in November.

title: Germany, Canada to Sign Major LNG Deal as Europe Seeks Energy Security
title_cn: 欧洲寻求能源安全，德国和加拿大将签署重大液化天然气协议
summary: Canada has reached a deal to supply Germany with liquefied natural gas from a planned facility on the west coast, a boost for Prime Minister Mark Carney, who wants to double the country’s exports to non-US markets.

title: Texas Showdown Latest Test of Trump's Sway | Balance of Power: Late Edition 5/26/2026
title_cn: 德克萨斯州对决对特朗普影响力的最新考验|权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) discusses the ongoing negotiations between the US and Iran, the blowback on President Trump's 'weaponization' fund, as well as the Texas Republican runoff election. Michael Allen, Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director, speaks on the situation in the Middle East and how the handling of the conflict may reflect on President Trump and his allies in time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Scott: Trump Won’t Punt Iran Nuclear Demands
title_cn: 参议员斯科特：特朗普不会拒绝伊朗的核要求
summary: Senator Rick Scott (R-FL), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations and Armed Services Committees, says he would be “shocked” if President Trump agreed to delay the nuclear component of any Iran deal, warning the choice is “unbelievable hostilities or a deal” and saying more military strikes may be needed to eliminate Iran’s nuclear capability. He also backs Trump’s proposed weaponization fund while saying he won’t seek taxpayer compensation himself, predicts Raúl Castro will leave Cuba before the US “pick[s] him up,” and says Republicans will hold Texas despite the bruising Cornyn-Paxton primary. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
